title: Cache Identity, TTL, Clock Injection, Readonly Copies, and Capacity · Retrieval Circuit
summary: A delayed maintainer review reconstructs cache identity, ttl, clock injection, readonly copies, and capacity from revision, runtime, command, unknown input, validation result, request identity, response fixture, promise state, cache decision, output, abort, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Create a canonical typed key from endpoint, resolved identity, page parameters, and representation rather than user spelling.
